mapper.update:
UPDATE clazz
name = #{name}, room = #{room}, begin_date = #{beginDate}, end_date = #{endDate}, master_id = #{masterId},
subject = #{subject},
update_time = NOW()
WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO clazz (name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId}, #{subject}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime})
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.name, c.room, c.begin_date beginDate, c.end_date endDate, c.master_id masterId, c.subject, c.create_time createTime, c.update_time updateTime, e.name masterName, CASE WHEN c.begin_date > NOW() THEN '未开班' WHEN c.end_date <NOW() THEN '已结课' ELSE '在读' END status FROM clazz c LEFT JOIN emp e ON c.master_id = e.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
